title: For the worthy
description: A datapack that increases difficulty, inspired by the Terraria Legendary difficulty setting
body:
This datapack aims to increase the difficulty of minecraft with stronger enemies and new mob captains.


<details>
<summary>Upgraded mobs</summary>

Most of the monsters you will face against will have increased stats (hp and damage) that vary        based on the mob. Here's a list of all the mobs with modified stats:
    
  - All zombie variants 
  - All baby zombies
  - Blazes
  - All skeleton variants
  - All spiders
  - Endermen
  - Piglins
  - Piglin brutes (also have armor)
  - Vindicators
  - Evokers


</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler: mob captains</summary>

Here is a list of all the monsters that can spawn as captains and their rare drops:

  - Skeletons: golden great sword (+1 attack range)
  - Strays and bogged: iron great sword (+1 attack range)
  - Whiter skeletons: gilded netherite leggings (piglins won't attack you)
  - Vindicators: great iron axe (+1 attack range)
  - Drowned (all drowned with tridents now are captains): trident


</details>
